message:
fix(command): harden FAILOVER/MODULE/SENTINEL arity and fail-close CLIENT TRACKING

Tighten argument validation across several command families:

FAILOVER: fix port parsing to use parse_i64_arg() + u16::try_from()
  instead of direct string parsing
MODULE HELP: add strict arity check rejecting extra arguments
SENTINEL: add arity validation for HELP, MYID, MASTERS, MONITOR,
  SLAVES, SENTINELS, GET-MASTER-ADDR-BY-NAME, CKQUORUM,
  FLUSHCONFIG, PENDING-SCRIPTS; use exact != checks instead of <
CLIENT TRACKING/CACHING: explicitly return unsupported errors
  (fail-closed pattern) instead of silently returning OK

Add 6 new tests validating stricter arity enforcement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
